Manager CW Bot
  • Tickets

Tickets

CW Ticket System for the admin-user / user-admin

Module of the ticket-system with work in DB MySQL.

class tickets.TicketAdminView(bot, mysql_data)[source]

Class of the ticket system UI for admin.

Parameters:

  • bot (TeleBot) –

  • mysql_data (dict) –

show_admin_users_tickets(call_query)[source]

Function of the show tickets to admin.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Callback Query by click on the button.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

class tickets.TicketAnswersToAdmin(bot, admin_id, mysql_data)[source]

Class for manage answers to admin by ticket-system.

Parameters:

  • bot (TeleBot) –

  • admin_id (int) –

  • mysql_data (dict) –

__get_id_ticket_for_answer_for_admin(message)

Get id ticket for answer to user and sending answer to admin.

Parameters:

message (Message) – Message of the user.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

explore_answer_admin_by_ticket(call_query)[source]

Handler (call-handler) for get id ticket for answer to admin.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Callback Query.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

class tickets.TicketAnswersToUsers(bot, admin_id, mysql_data)[source]

Class for manage answers to users by ticket-system.

Parameters:

  • bot (TeleBot) –

  • admin_id (int) –

  • mysql_data (dict) –

__get_id_ticket_for_answer(message)

Get id ticket for answer to user and sending answer to the user.

Parameters:

message (Message) – Message of the user.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

explore_answer_users_ticket(call_query)[source]

Handler (call-handler) for get id ticket for answer to user.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Callback Query.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

class tickets.TicketUserView(bot, mysql_data)[source]

Class of the ticket system UI for users.

Parameters:

  • bot (TeleBot) –

  • mysql_data (dict) –

__send_new_ticket(call_query)

Send ticket to admin via Manager Bot in the Menu with mini-UI.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Callback Query.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

__sending_ticket(message)

Sending the ticket from the user to admin and save data of ticket in the DB (MySQL).

Parameters:

message (Message) – Message (data ticket) of the user.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

__show_user_tickets(call_query)

Show user’s tickets in the Menu with mini-UI.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Callback Query.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

show_user_menu(call_query)[source]

Function of the show user’s menu.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Callback Query by click on the button.

Returns:

None.

None
